topic.title: INFO 7375 — Final Presentation Group One: Two Quick Things
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Finals presentations will take place over the next two Saturdays starting tomorrow.

If you're in Group 1 and would like to move to Group 2 (April 25), let me know. We have room. No questions asked, just reach out today.

If you're staying in Group 1, please submit your presentation as early as possible today. If you wait until the last minute, I won't have a chance to review it before tomorrow. The earlier you get it in, the better your chances of getting feedback from me before you present.

Reminder -- Group 1 Schedule, Saturday, April 18, 2026

12:00 -- Ankit Deopurkar 12:14 -- Mithran Ezhilarasan 12:28 -- Harsh Gujarati 12:42 -- Yingjie Hong 12:56 -- Swara Joshi 1:10 -- Sai Manasa Karanam 1:24 -- Karthik Kashyap

1:36 - 1:51 BREAK

1:51 -- Arjun Kavungal 2:05 -- Myclineshareena Kennedy 2:19 -- Manav Kheni 2:33 -- Shreya Kini 2:47 -- Pratiksha Mohod 3:01 -- Minal Naranje

See you Saturday.

— Prof. Nik & Nina
